impact: This advances the active PP&D DevHub guardrail task by proving a correction-upload review can generate a non-executing preview while consequential upload and certification actions stay blocked unless the user supplies the exact confirmation phrase for the current session.
summary: Add fixture-backed DevHub correction-upload review guardrail tests and a narrow deterministic evaluator for preview versus official upload/certification gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-57: Add DevHub guardrail tests proving correction-upload review can produce a preview but cannot perform official upload or certification without exact session-specific user confirmation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
